title: Classified Access
wikitext:
[]: Classified Access Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 05, 2008 3:18 am This is after watching that 45 min vid.... Only the top people in Nerv have access to Terminal Dogma (Gendo, Fuyutsuki and Ritsuko, NOT Misato.) right? Then how does Misato know about Lilith on the cross if she doesn't have access there. Kaji hasn't even come to the series yet. Correct me if I'm being stupid.

[]: Post by CtHuLhU » Sat Jan 05, 2008 3:26 am The sum of probable reasons: - changes in the script; - increase a rank; - she's hacker; - bullshit.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Jan 05, 2008 12:57 pm She has a higher rank in this version, so she does have access.

[]: Post by yokuchi » Sat Jan 05, 2008 1:47 pm What's her new rank?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 05, 2008 1:53 pm Colonel-Lieutenant as opposed to being promoted to Major from Capitan.

[]: Post by V » Sat Jan 05, 2008 4:02 pm the implication that some are supporting is that what Misato THINKS is Lilith isn't the "real" Lilith, though she does nonetheless know "we've got a live Angel contained in a deep level of the base" which she didn't before. Remember, originally Misato thought Lilith was Adam. So if this time Misato originally thinks its Lilith....

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Jan 05, 2008 4:09 pm This one is LILITH+?.

[]: Post by Skullraper » Sat Jan 05, 2008 4:32 pm NAveryW wrote: This one is LILITH+?.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:03 pm I'd be just fine and happy if "confusion over identity of Underground Giant" (which had always been a rather lame bit in NGE) is completely written out and replaced with "confusion over identity of Moon Giant".

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:26 pm I didn't consider it lame. If I remember correctly, though, it was spoiled for me. However, I don't think I remember correctly.

[]: Post by Typhus » Sat Jan 05, 2008 9:13 pm yes whats the deal with the thingy on the moon??

[]: Post by Skullraper » Sat Jan 05, 2008 10:31 pm Typhus wrote: yes whats the deal with the thingy on the moon??

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Nov 15, 2009 4:30 am Well crap, it was Chuck Norris. I can't believe you were right.

[]: Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Nov 15, 2009 7:09 pm NAveryW wrote: Well crap, it was Chuck Norris. I can't believe you were right.

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Nov 15, 2009 7:12 pm Theyre like the magic nose goblins from Ren and Stimpy, they're the magic cum goblins! *insert facepalm here*
